inputs.label: Average Daily Demand
inputs.businessContext: The steady-state average daily usage rate derived from historical demand data.

businessContext_i18n.en: The steady-state average daily usage rate derived from historical demand data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçmiş talep verilerinden elde edilen kararlı durum ortalama günlük kullanım oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der stationäre durchschnittliche tägliche Verbrauch, abgeleitet aus historischen Bedarfsdaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'utilisation quotidien moyen en régime permanent, dérivé des données historiques de la demande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de uso diario promedio en estado estable derivada de datos históricos de demanda.

inputs.label: Demand Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Variability of daily demand, measured as standard deviation, reflecting forecast error.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variability of daily demand, measured as standard deviation, reflecting forecast error.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük talebin standart sapma olarak ölçülen değişkenliği, tahmin hatasını yansıtır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variabilität der täglichen Nachfrage, gemessen als Standardabweichung, die den Prognosefehler widerspiegelt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Variabilité de la demande quotidienne, mesurée par l'écart type, reflétant l'erreur de prévision.
businessContext_i18n.es: Variabilidad de la demanda diaria, medida como desviación estándar, que refleja el error de pronóstico.

inputs.label: Average Lead Time
inputs.businessContext: Mean replenishment lead time from supplier, in days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean replenishment lead time from supplier, in days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçiden ortalama yenileme süresi, gün cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittlere Wiederbeschaffungszeit vom Lieferanten in Tagen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Délai de réapprovisionnement moyen du fournisseur, en jours.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo medio de reabastecimiento del proveedor, en días.

inputs.label: Lead Time Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Variability of lead time, measured as standard deviation, reflecting supply uncertainty.

label_i18n.fr: Écart type du délai de livraison
label_i18n.es: Desviación estándar del tiempo de entrega

businessContext_i18n.en: Variability of lead time, measured as standard deviation, reflecting supply uncertainty.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarik süresinin standart sapma olarak ölçülen değişkenliği, tedarik belirsizliğini yansıtır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variabilität der Vorlaufzeit, gemessen als Standardabweichung, die die Lieferunsicherheit widerspiegelt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Variabilité du délai de livraison, mesurée par l'écart type, reflétant l'incertitude de l'approvisionnement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Variabilidad del tiempo de entrega, medida como desviación estándar, que refleja la incertidumbre del suministro.

inputs.label: Service Level (Z-score)
inputs.businessContext: Z-score corresponding to desired service level (e.g., 1.65 for 95% fill rate). Must be positive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Z-score corresponding to desired service level (e.g., 1.65 for 95% fill rate). Must be positive.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen hizmet seviyesine karşılık gelen Z-skoru (örneğin, %95 doluluk oranı için 1,65). Pozitif olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Z-Wert, der dem gewünschten Servicegrad entspricht (z. B. 1,65 für 95 % Lieferbereitschaft). Muss positiv sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score Z correspondant au niveau de service souhaité (par exemple, 1,65 pour un taux de service de 95 %). Doit être positif.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación Z correspondiente al nivel de servicio deseado (por ejemplo, 1.65 para una tasa de llenado del 95%). Debe ser positiva.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
